prompt: A vast ancient library stretching infinitely into total darkness. Only a small cluster of bookshelves on the left glows with warm amber candlelight, books vivid in deep reds, navy and gold. Behind them, shelves collapse into grey ash and cinder. 95% of the library is darkness and ruin. A tiny human silhouette stands at the edge of the light, facing the infinite dark. Dust motes float in the last shafts of amber light. Cinematic, photorealistic, dramatic lighting, 4K.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Of approximately 7,000 languages spoken today, around 2,900 are endangered — roughly one disappears every two weeks, erasing irreplaceable human knowledge forever.
